title: Procure 120 developer laptops under tight budget with mandatory compliance
description: We need to source 120 developer laptops for EU office expansion in Q3 2026. Total budget ceiling: EUR 200,000 (approximately EUR 1,667 per unit maximum — this is a hard cap, not a target). ISO 27001:2022 certification is mandatory and non-negotiable — any vendor without a current, verified ISO 27001 certificate from an accredited body must be eliminated regardless of price. GDPR Data Processing Agreement is required. Specifications: 32GB RAM minimum, 1TB SSD, 3-year on-site warranty, delivery from EU warehouse within 12 weeks of contract signature. Evaluate all available vendors against both the budget ceiling and the compliance requirement. If no vendor simultaneously meets both the budget ceiling and the ISO 27001 certification requirement, do not recommend any vendor — escalate with a clear explanation of why no vendor qualifies and what decision the human must make (increase budget or accept a compliance exception with documented risk).
